title: Milestone Camping Folding Tripod Stool, Camping, Garden, Fishing, Festivals, 80kg Weight Load, Comfortable Fabric Seat, Compact and Lightweight, Carry Strap Included for Easy Travel
features: CONVENIENT FOLDING STOOL - Make sure you have a reliable seat wherever you go thanks to this Compact Folding Stool from Milestone! It unfolds quickly and easily making it ideal to quickly provide extra seating when camping, at festivals, in the park, or taking part in any other outdoor activities!

PORTABLE DESIGN - Thanks to its tripod leg design, the stool easily unfolds to be stood up, and is easily folded together again for better storage once you're done! It also comes with a strap to keep the legs together while folded, as well as a carry strap to make transporting it simple when you're out and about.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS – The sturdy legs of the stool are made from steel, ensuring their durability, and allowing them to hold a weight of up to 80kg while remaining lightweight. The seat itself is made from comfortable, water-resistant polyester fabric, making it ideal for tougher outdoor conditions.

PERFECT SIZE - When unfolded, the stool measures at 43cm height by 33cm width/length, giving plenty of seating room at a comfortable height for most people! When folded, its size is much narrower, making it slender and easier to store & carry wherever you go.

MILESTONE CAMPING - Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. From tents and sleeping bags, to chairs and camp cutlery, visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Portable Tripod Design Folding Camping Stool Ensure that you can conveniently take a seat anywhere using this Portable Folding Camping Stool. Its stable, folding tripod design allows for both easy setup and storage with minimal effort. The seat itself is made from water resistant material, making it ideal for camping, fishing, and all sorts of other outdoor activities. Previous page Comfortable Outdoor Seat The seats stand at a height of 43cm, making them comfortable for camping, fishing, gardens & more. Portable Design The stool easily folds up to be taken anywhere, with a handy carry strap also included. Durable Materials The seat is made from water-resistant polyester, and the steel legs hold up to 80kg of weight. Portable for Travel Weighing less than 1 KG, the pump is ideal for use at home, festivals, campsites, and in campervans.
